title: AI Resume Builder — How to Automate Job Applications & Resume Writing
summary: Jobright is an AI resume builder platform used by 2M+ people to automate job search tasks including resume tailoring, application autofilling, role matching, and cover letter generation. The platform includes a Chrome extension for form autofilling and built-in AI career coaching features.
writeup: This video walks through Jobright, an AI resume builder that automates job search tasks for a user base reported at over 2 million people. Coverage spans resume tailoring, application autofilling, role matching, and cover letter generation, with a Chrome extension handling form autofilling and built-in AI career coaching features. The focus is on consolidating repetitive application work into a single automated workflow.
